= Metrologia data from IOP JATS 1.3

== Purpose

IOP provides JATS XML for all journals it publishes, including the BIPM
Metrologia.

This directory contains sample JATS 1.3 XML files from the private
https://github.com/relaton/rawdata-bipm[rawdata-bipm] repository that is used to
generate Metrologia data in Relaton. These files are obtained directly from the
private IOP API.

IOP has officially changed from JATS 1.1 to JATS 1.3 in 2024-06.

These files are used for round-tripping tests.

== License

These XML files provide metadata of Metrologia of which the copyright is owned
by the BIPM.
